# Glamandi API Generation Notes

Generated NestJS backend layer for the Glamandi Property Management Operating System.

Key principles implemented:

- MongoDB remains the source of truth.
- IndexedDB/offline outbox is treated as temporary operational cache only.
- Financial records are never hard-deleted; reversal routes and audit hooks are included.
- Paystack and Daraja webhook entry points are wired for server-side verification and processing.
- Brand color constants are captured in API configuration for downstream website/control-center use.
